name: tosiq-yol-root
description: To'siq Yo'l Telegram Mini App Workspace

scripts.install-all: npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix server/admin
scripts.build-all: npm --prefix client run build && npm --prefix server/admin run build
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix client" "npm run dev --prefix server"
